# Simper

**Summary**: An analysis to determine which species contribute most to the difference between groups.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] used SIMPER analysis to describe the contribution of each taxon to overall dissimilarity.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Peneroplis, Lachlanella, and Quinqueloculina were the primary contributors to dissimilarity. ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 52]])
